headline: Best documentary picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better documentary picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring pangolin kulu’s journey, Inside the Mind of a Dog, and Backyard Wilderness — plus more documentary picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best documentary picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring pangolin kulu’s journey, Inside the Mind of a Dog, and Backyard Wilderness — plus more documentary picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: pangolin kulu’s journey
selected_titles.description: A heartwarming documentary following Kulu, a rescued pangolin, as conservationists help rehabilitate and return the endangered animal back to the wild.

selected_titles.title: Inside the Mind of a Dog
selected_titles.description: A documentary exploring how dogs think, learn, and interact with humans.

selected_titles.title: Backyard Wilderness
selected_titles.description: A documentary about the hidden wonders of nature right in our own backyards.

selected_titles.title: senna
selected_titles.description: A moving and immersive documentary that chronicles the rise and tragic death of Brazilian Formula One racing champion Ayrton Senna, told almost entirely through archival footage and his own voice.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
